title: Level 13: CSS for Forms
description: Forms ko boring se beautiful banana.
guide:
Styling Tips

  • Padding: Input text ko border se door rakhta hai.
  • Border-Radius: Konon ko gol karta hai.
  • :focus: Ye tab chalta hai jab user input par click karta hai. Isse hum user ko bata sakte hain ki wo kahan likh raha hai.
